systems.name: Stripe
systems.description: Stripe's design system tokens — clean, professional fintech design with excellent typography and a signature purple accent.

systems.name: Linear
systems.description: Linear's design system tokens — dark-first, minimal, fast. Iconic developer productivity aesthetic.

systems.name: Apple HIG
systems.description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines — iOS/macOS design language. SF Pro typography, system colors, vibrancy, and spatial design.

systems.name: Material Design 3
systems.description: Google's Material Design 3 (Material You) — dynamic color, expressive motion, adaptive layouts.

systems.name: Vercel
systems.description: Vercel's Geist design system — monochrome elegance with developer-first aesthetics.

systems.name: shadcn/ui
systems.description: shadcn/ui component tokens — beautifully designed components using Radix and Tailwind CSS. HSL-based Zinc palette.

systems.name: GitHub Primer
systems.description: GitHub's Primer design system — functional, accessible, scale-tested across one of the world's largest developer platforms.

systems.name: Notion
systems.description: Notion's design tokens — warm, approachable, content-first design with generous spacing and highlight colors.

systems.name: Supabase
systems.description: Supabase's design tokens — dark-mode-first developer tool aesthetic with signature green accent and glow effects.

systems.name: Tailwind CSS
systems.description: Tailwind CSS default design tokens — comprehensive utility-first color palette, spacing scale, typography, and breakpoints.

systems.name: Spotify
systems.description: Spotify's design language — dark-first music UI with vibrant green CTAs, card-heavy layout, and high-contrast hierarchy.

systems.name: Airbnb
systems.description: Airbnb's design language system (DLS) — warm, trustworthy, accessible. Rausch red, Cereal font, generous 8px grid.
